text.content:
Injuries • Cold • Arctic Awakening

Injury Card

Arctic Awakening

A haze of frost surrounds you, your very breath crystallizing in the air. Your body becomes one with the winter landscape, as if the frost itself has claimed you as its own.

Glacial Transformation
Treatment

Seeking a powerful mage of warmth to draw forth the latent heat within you is your only chance to escape becoming a permanent fixture in the snow.

Details

  • Category: Cold

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 12 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Frozen in Time

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Cold

  • odds: 10

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Arctic Awakening

  • imagetitle: Glacial Transformation

  • image: icons/magic/air/wind-weather-snow-gusts.webp

  • description: A haze of frost surrounds you, your very breath crystallizing in the air. Your body becomes one with the winter landscape, as if the frost itself has claimed you as its own.

  • treatment: Seeking a powerful mage of warmth to draw forth the latent heat within you is your only chance to escape becoming a permanent fixture in the snow.

  • severity: Major

  • damage: 12

  • duration: 0

  • action: Apply the Cold Injury

  • statuseffect: Frozen in Time

Injuries • Cold • Frostbitten Fingertips

Injury Card

Frostbitten Fingertips

Your fingertips turn a frosty hue, feeling numb and unresponsive to touch. Even the warmest flames offer only fleeting relief as the cold magic's hold tightens.

Chilling Grasp
Treatment

Rubbing your hands vigorously with infused frostweed oil and wearing insulated gloves will gradually restore sensation.

Details

  • Category: Cold

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 40

  • Status Effect: Clumsy Fingers

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: Rubbing your hands vigorously with infused frostweed oil and wearing insulated gloves will gradually restore sensation.

  • severity: Minor

  • duration: 240

  • action: Apply the Cold Injury

  • statuseffect: Clumsy Fingers

Injuries • Cold • Frosty Fingers

Injury Card

Frosty Fingers

The character's fingers have become numb and frostbitten, causing them to fumble with objects and weapons. Everything they touch turns to icicles, including their sense of dexterity.

Chilling Touch
Treatment

Warm up by the fire or use hand warmers to regain feeling and control in the frosty fingers.

Details

  • Category: Cold

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 30

  • Status Effect: Restrained

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Cold

  • odds: 15

  • foldername: Injuries

  • treatment: Warm up by the fire or use hand warmers to regain feeling and control in the frosty fingers.

  • severity: Moderate

  • damage: 7

  • duration: 180

  • action: Apply the Cold Injury

  • statuseffect: Restrained

Injuries • Cold • Frozen Fingers

Injury Card

Frozen Fingers

Your fingers become numb, turning a shade of blue that rivals the frost itself. Fumbling with objects becomes a comedy of errors as you struggle to maintain your grip, feeling as though you've unknowingly entered a slapstick routine.

Treatment

Warming up your hands with a cozy fire or a hot beverage can help thaw out your frozen digits. Avoiding further exposure to extreme cold is also advisable to prevent prolonged discomfort.

Details

  • Category: Cold

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Prone

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Cold

  • odds: 40

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Frozen Fingers

  • treatment: Warming up your hands with a cozy fire or a hot beverage can help thaw out your frozen digits. Avoiding further exposure to extreme cold is also advisable to prevent prolonged discomfort.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 3

  • duration: 300

  • action: Apply the Cold Injury

  • statuseffect: Prone

Injuries • Cold • Frozen Heartbeat

Injury Card

Frozen Heartbeat

Your heart beats to the slow, steady rhythm of an ancient glacier, each pulse sending a frigid shiver through your body. The winter's icy grasp threatens to freeze your very core.

Icy Pulse
Treatment

Drinking a steaming tonic brewed with hearthfire moss and receiving a warm embrace can help thaw the chill within.

Details

  • Category: Cold

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 100

  • Status Effect: Chilled to the Bone

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: Drinking a steaming tonic brewed with hearthfire moss and receiving a warm embrace can help thaw the chill within.

  • duration: 600

  • action: Apply the Cold Injury

  • statuseffect: Chilled to the Bone

Injuries • Cold • Frozen Noggin

Injury Card

Frozen Noggin

The character's head has been chilled to the core, causing brain freeze and rendering them unable to concentrate. Spells may fizzle out unexpectedly and thoughts become as frozen as a winter fruit smoothie.

Chilling Accident
Treatment

Consume a warm beverage, like a nice cup of tea, to help melt away the cold inside the brain.

Details

  • Category: Cold

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: Stunned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Cold

  • odds: 30

  • treatment: Consume a warm beverage, like a nice cup of tea, to help melt away the cold inside the brain.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 3

  • duration: 120

  • action: Apply the Cold Injury

  • statuseffect: Stunned

Injuries • Cold • Icy Heart

Injury Card

Icy Heart

The character's heart has been encased in ice, turning them into a cold, emotionless husk. Friendships freeze over, and love thaws out. They become as chilly as an iceberg in the ocean of feelings.

Frozen Emotions
Treatment

Warmth can only be found in the heartfelt words of companions or by performing acts of kindness to melt the icy barriers around the heart.

Details

  • Category: Cold

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 11 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Charmed

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Cold • Slippery Slope Syndrome

Injury Card

Slippery Slope Syndrome

You feel a sudden chill as if a mischievous winter spirit has taken up residency in your veins. Your movements become slightly clumsy, as if you're trying to ice skate on solid ground.

Frosty Misstep
Treatment

Warm tea made from snowberry leaves and resting by a cozy fire will help alleviate symptoms.

Details

  • Category: Cold

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Sluggish

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Cold • Slippery Slopes

Injury Card

Slippery Slopes

The character's feet have turned into blocks of ice, making walking as precarious as wearing socks on a frozen lake. Every step is a potential slip and slide, causing embarrassment and bruised tailbones.

Icy Misstep
Treatment

Walk carefully on heated floors or wear warm, grippy socks to regain stability.

Details

  • Category: Cold

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 15

  • Status Effect: Prone
